# Agentic CI/CD Copilot — Recommended Fix

Updates pytest.ini to set log_file to a writable path './pytest.log' instead of '/var/log/pytest.log'.

## Suggested Diff (apply manually if needed)

```diff
--- a/pytest.ini
+++ b/pytest.ini
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
 [pytest]
-log_file = /var/log/pytest.log
+log_file = ./pytest.log
```
